nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Admin session. Body: { action: 'create'|'update', submission_id? (for update), carrier_id, lead_id?, advisor_id?, product_line, submission_status?, policy_number?, face_amount_cents?, annual_premium_cents?, notes? }. Status transitions: in_progress → submitted → underwriting → approved/declined → issued/not_taken/withdrawn. Auto-sets submitted_at / underwriting_decision_at / policy_issued_at based on the status the row is moving to.
